mapper.select: SELECT metric_code, previous_value, value_text, collect_time FROM ( SELECT metric_code,value_text,collect_time, lag(value_text) OVER(PARTITION BY metric_code ORDER BY collect_time) previous_value FROM metric_text_data_1d WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND metric_code LIKE 'mysql.var_text.%' ) h WHERE collect_time>=#{since} AND previous_value IS DISTINCT FROM value_text ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT ON(metric_code) metric_code,value_text,collect_time FROM metric_text_data_1d WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND metric_code LIKE 'mysql.var_text.%' ORDER BY metric_code,collect_time DESC

SELECT metric_code,previous_value,value AS value_text,collect_time FROM ( SELECT metric_code,value,collect_time, lag(value) OVER(PARTITION BY metric_code ORDER BY collect_time) previous_value FROM metric_data_1d WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND metric_code LIKE 'mysql.var.%' ) h WHERE collect_time>=#{since} AND previous_value IS DISTINCT FROM value ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT ON(metric_code) metric_code,value AS value_text,collect_time FROM metric_data_1d WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND metric_code LIKE 'mysql.var.%' ORDER BY metric_code,collect_time DESC

SELECT object_name,value,collect_time FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON(object_name) object_name,value,collect_time FROM metric_capacity_object WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND metric_code='mysql.capacity.auto_increment_usage_pct' AND collect_time>=now()-interval '2 days' ORDER BY object_name,collect_time DESC ) latest ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mysql_plan_history (instance_id,schema_name,sql_hash,plan_hash,query_text,plan_format,plan_json,node_summary, risk_level,conclusion,previous_plan_hash,plan_changed,captured_by,captured_at) VALUES (#{plan.instanceId},#{plan.schemaName},#{plan.sqlHash},#{plan.planHash},#{plan.queryText}, #{plan.planFormat},CAST(#{plan.planJson} AS jsonb),CAST(#{plan.summaryJson} AS jsonb), #{plan.riskLevel},#{plan.conclusion},#{plan.previousPlanHash},#{plan.planChanged},#{plan.capturedBy},now()) ON CONFLICT(instance_id,schema_name,sql_hash,plan_hash) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_hash FROM mysql_security_snapshot WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 1
